name: preset-mcp-skills
description: Preset/Superset MCP skills for deterministic tool discovery, safe MCP workflows, and MCP-only surface routing.

interface.shortDescription: Use Preset/Superset MCP tools through deterministic discovery and safety boundaries.
interface.longDescription: Markdown skills for agents using Preset/Superset Model Context Protocol tools. Includes MCP-only routing, deterministic discovery order, data-returning and mutating tool guardrails, and explicit approval before switching to direct API surfaces.
defaultPrompt: Run SQL through MCP with approval
